◎简　　介  

　　Have you ever seen Uwe Boll's weirdo slasher flick Seed? Better yet, have you even heard of it? It doesn't matter. You're going to. Especially when the recently announced Seed 2: The New Breed comes around. www. 5233tv.comDr. Boll will be serving as producer on this one with Marcel Walz directing.
